'''paluru''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jhummia|jhummia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-l-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jhummia|jhummia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| paluru
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pælirith|pælirith]] || [[word:pælirij|pælirij]] || [[word:pælirish|pælirish]] || [[word:pæliri|pæliri]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:paluluruth|paluluruth]] || [[word:paluluruj|paluluruj]] || [[word:palulurush|palulurush]] || [[word:paluluru|paluluru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:paluruth|paluruth]] || [[word:paluruj|paluruj]] || [[word:palurush|palurush]] || [[word:paluru|paluru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:palufruth|palufruth]] || [[word:palufruj|palufruj]] || [[word:palufrush|palufrush]] || [[word:palufruf|palufruf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:paluruthu|paluruthu]] || [[word:paluruju|paluruju]] || [[word:palurushu|palurushu]] || [[word:paluruku|paluruku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:paluruth|paluruth]] || [[word:paluruj|paluruj]] || [[word:palurush|palurush]] || [[word:paluru|paluru]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:paluruthul|paluruthul]] || [[word:palurujul|palurujul]] || [[word:palurushul|palurushul]] || [[word:palurukul|palurukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:paluruthuthu|paluruthuthu]] || [[word:palurujuju|palurujuju]] || [[word:palurushushu|palurushushu]] || [[word:paluruku|paluruku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:paluruthun|paluruthun]] || [[word:palurujun|palurujun]] || [[word:palurushun|palurushun]] || [[word:palurukun|palurukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:paluruthuoro|paluruthuoro]] || [[word:palurujuoro|palurujuoro]] || [[word:palurushuoro|palurushuoro]] || [[word:palurukuoro|palurukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
